summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlobalFood Menu API integration and homepage ordering buttons. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: GlobalFood Menu API endpoint (/api/globalfood/menu) returns 200 with menu data
Menu API response contains 'categories' array with items
Menu API response has EUR currency
Categories contain items with required fields (id, name, price, description)
Content API returns hero buttons array with 4 buttons
'BESTELLEN ZUM ABHOLEN' button has correct URL: https://www.foodbooking.com/api/fb/_q_y4z_v
Homepage loads with all action buttons visible
MENÜ navigation link visible in navbar
Navigation from homepage to /menu works correctly
Menu page loads and displays categories from GlobalFood API (4 categories: Vorspeisen, Pizza Classiche, Pasta, Insalata)
Menu items display with prices in EUR format (e.g., 11,90 €, 12,00 €)
Category tabs switch correctly between different menu sections
seed_data_creation: None required - uses GlobalFood external API
context_for_next_testing_agent: GlobalFood Menu API integration is fully functional. Homepage buttons for pickup (foodbooking.com/api/fb/_q_y4z_v) and reservation (foodbooking.com/api/res/_q_y4z_v) are correctly configured. Menu page displays categories dynamically from API with proper EUR price formatting and German labels.
